goal: Recipe CRUD surface inside the Project Editor. Recipes are reusable species templates owned by the project (per decision gad-189). This task: (a) define the `recipe.json` schema — name, description, base species slug, default gad.json overrides, list of required inputs, list of expected outputs; (b) store recipes at `projects/<project>/<project-editor-slug>/recipes/<recipe-slug>/recipe.json` alongside species/; (c) editor UI: list of recipes in the Project Editor shell, create/edit/delete buttons (each with a cid), a form backed by the inventory-grid primitive from 44.5-05; (d) "run recipe" action that produces a new species in the project's species/ directory and triggers an eval generation via the command bridge; (e) a recipe-level cid so the modal footer CRUD can target recipes. No inheritance-from-recipe runtime yet — first cut is "recipe authors a species, species runs normally".
